normalization.notes: Store Arabic text in NFC and preserve source strings for audit. Keep analysis copies separate when inspecting hamza seats, alif variants, ta marbuta, lam-alif presentation forms, and optional harakat. Do not compatibility-fold learner-visible text.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: base letters, joining behavior, positional forms, hamza and alif variants, ta marbuta, lam-alif chunk, long-vowel letters, and optional short-vowel marks
segmentation.notes: Arabic uses whitespace but clitics and affixes complicate word-level pedagogy. Treat contextual glyph forms as rendering variants of one pedagogical letter unless a lesson explicitly teaches a chunk such as lam-alif.

sources.notes: Joining type and shaping metadata needed to explain positional forms without storing presentation forms as content.

Short menu, sign, and label examples authored by GlyphBridge from reviewed vocabulary rather than copied from third-party corpora.
